name: @borjie/data-onboarding
description: Data Onboarding (Wave 18U) — the 7-stage capability that places owner-uploaded data where it belongs in the tenant's database. Entity recognition, schema discovery, existing-schema matching, Tier-2 schema evolution proposals, row persistence with provenance, profile-chain graph building, and Tier-0 deep-online-research enrichment. Implements docs/DESIGN/DATA_ONBOARDING_SPEC.md.
